prose: **Fukui Reactivity Indices of Acrolein** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP), PySCF backend, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: input structure from supplied acrolein.xyz, single-point calculation (not geometry-optimized). Partial charges computed via Mulliken scheme; electronic states (neutral, cation N−1, anion N+1) all converged. Fukui indices f⁺ (electrophilicity), f⁻ (nucleophilicity), f⁰ (radical), and dual descriptor computed from charge differences. **Most electrophilic site:** atom 4 (terminal C), f⁺ = 0.64232102. **Most nucleophilic site:** atom 1 (carbonyl O), f⁻ = 0.39388616. Full per-atom Fukui data returned in result JSON. Charge conservation checks passed (sum f⁺ = 1.0, sum f⁻ = 1.0). No warnings reported. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy = true.
